headline: 5 High ROE Stocks to Buy as Markets Recover After Fed-Induced Sell-Off
summary: ROST, TEL, BBVA, GL and SCHW stand out as high-ROE, cash-rich stocks as markets rebound from the Fed-driven sell-off.
